data.content: Approved in implementation review. Verified the integrated scope-refinement implementation now (1) enqueues background refinement on successful beat creation without blocking the 201 response, (2) provides an in-memory queue plus async worker with configurable prompt and explicit opt-in agent dispatch, (3) wires scope_refinement into advanced pool dispatch and settings defaults/UI, and (4) exposes completion notifications plus status polling coverage through the real route and hook paths. Advanced child reviews 1061, 47a2, and 681b to ready_for_shipment during this session; the other children were already at ready_for_shipment. Sanity gates passed in work/foolery-d984: bun run lint (warnings only, no errors), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build.
